Description: Verify Pixel phone pairs with HU via Bluetooth Classic
Steps: Open Settings > Bluetooth; tap Pair new device; select Pixel
Expected: Device shows as Connected within 5s
Pre Conditions: Vehicle is in READY; phone Bluetooth ON

Description: Reject pairing for device without HFP support
Steps: Attempt to pair a fitness tracker without HFP
Expected: Pairing fails with descriptive UI error
Pre Conditions: Bluetooth ON; tracker in pairing mode

Description: Verify FM tuner auto-stores top 6 stations
Steps: Open Radio; switch to FM; tap Auto-store
Expected: Six valid stations populate preset slots

Test Title: DAB to FM fallback on weak signal
Description: Verify DAB falls back to FM on signal loss
Steps: Tune DAB station; drive into known weak-coverage area
Expected: System switches to matching FM frequency within 3s

Description: Place outgoing call using voice command
Steps: Press voice button; say "Call Alice mobile"
Expected: Call places to Alice mobile within 5s

Description: Verify blocked numbers are auto-rejected
Steps: Call HU from a blocked number
Expected: Incoming call popup is suppressed; missed-call entry logged

Description: Navigation reroutes within 10s of missed turn
Steps: Start route; intentionally miss the next turn
Expected: Map recomputes route within 10s

Description: Verify navigation continues on cell loss
Steps: Start route; disable cellular data
Expected: Map keeps drawing using cached tiles for at least 30 min
Pre Conditions: Cached tiles for the area; active route

Description: Verify "Hey Google" wakes the assistant
Steps: Say "Hey Google" with the car parked
Expected: Voice UI shows listening indicator within 1s
Pre Conditions: Voice assistant enabled; privacy mute OFF

Description: Wake word ignored when privacy mute is ON
Steps: Toggle privacy mute ON; say wake word
Expected: Assistant does NOT activate

Description: Adjust driver temp without affecting passenger
Steps: Tap driver temp up 3°C
Expected: Driver temp increments by 3°C; passenger unchanged
Pre Conditions: Climate Sync OFF; AUTO mode ON

Description: Defrost mode overrides AUTO fan curve
Steps: Tap Defrost; observe fan and airflow icons
Expected: Fan ramps to high; airflow routes to windshield

Description: Schedule charging to start at 23:00
Steps: Open EV charging settings; set schedule 23:00 to 06:00
Expected: Charging starts within 2 min after 23:00
Pre Conditions: Vehicle plugged in; AC charger detected

Description: Charging resumes when plug is reinserted
Steps: Start charging; unplug for 30s; replug
Expected: Charging resumes at last known rate

Test Title: ADAS warning render in driver display
Description: Lane-keep warning renders correctly
Steps: Drift across lane marker on highway
Expected: Lane-keep warning icon + haptic within 200ms

Description: Restrict Netflix while moving
Steps: Open Netflix; begin driving above 5 km/h
Expected: Netflix UI is blocked with explanation; audio continues
Pre Conditions: Netflix installed; driver in driver seat

Description: OTA install blocked when vehicle is moving
Steps: Trigger OTA install with vehicle in DRIVE
Expected: Install blocked; user prompted to retry when parked

Description: Dark mode auto-engages at civil twilight
Steps: Wait until civil twilight; observe HMI theme
Expected: HMI switches to dark theme within 60s

Description: HU auto-connects to known Wi-Fi hotspots
Steps: Cycle ignition; observe Wi-Fi status icon
Expected: Hotspot connected within 10s of key-on

Description: Connection survives 5G to 4G handover
Steps: Drive out of 5G coverage on active call
Expected: Call/audio continues without drop
